mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS tagId, t.name, COUNT(DISTINCT at.article_id) AS articleCount FROM tag t LEFT JOIN article_tag at ON at.tag_id = t.id LEFT JOIN article a ON a.id = at.article_id AND a.status = 1 GROUP BY t.id, t.name HAVING articleCount > 0 ORDER BY articleCount DESC

SELECT LEAST(at1.tag_id, at2.tag_id) AS tagId1, GREATEST(at1.tag_id, at2.tag_id) AS tagId2, COUNT(DISTINCT at1.article_id) AS cooccurCount, AVG(DATEDIFF(NOW(), a.create_time)) AS avgDays FROM article_tag at1 INNER JOIN article_tag at2 ON at1.article_id = at2.article_id AND at1.tag_id < at2.tag_id INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = at1.article_id AND a.status = 1 GROUP BY tagId1, tagId2 HAVING cooccurCount >= 1

SELECT a.author_id AS authorId, COUNT(*) AS articleCount FROM article a INNER JOIN article_tag at ON at.article_id = a.id AND at.tag_id = #{tagId} WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.author_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.author_id ORDER BY articleCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.id AS tagId, t.name, COUNT(*) AS weight, 'write' AS source FROM article a INNER JOIN article_tag at ON at.article_id = a.id INNER JOIN tag t ON t.id = at.tag_id WHERE a.author_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1 GROUP BY t.id, t.name

SELECT t.id AS tagId, t.name, COUNT(*) AS weight, 'favorite' AS source FROM article_favorite f INNER JOIN article_tag at ON at.article_id = f.article_id INNER JOIN tag t ON t.id = at.tag_id INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = f.article_id AND a.status = 1 WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY t.id, t.name
SELECT a.id AS tagId, a.title AS name, a.view_count AS articleCount FROM article a WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.view_count DESC, a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT a.author_id AS tagId, COUNT(*) AS articleCount FROM article a WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.author_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.author_id ORDER BY articleCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT at.tag_id AS tagId, COUNT(*) AS weight FROM page_view_event p INNER JOIN article_tag at ON at.article_id = p.article_id WHERE p.page_type = 'article' AND p.article_id IS NOT NULL AND p.created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY at.tag_id
